A.name: A · 占位精修
A.desc: 保留占位的节点尺寸阶层（1.2/1.5/2.4），连线 trim 到节点外缘修复『线穿圆心』问题。其他不变。
A.svgInner:
<line x1="5.4985" y1="8.6656" x2="9.2519" y2="11.1679" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>

  <line x1="19.0821" y1="16.3283" x2="19.709" y2="18.8358" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>

  <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="1.2" fill="currentColor"/>

B.name: B · 与 DE/RCP family rhyme
B.desc: 节点统一 r=1.5，hub r=2.5（比占位 2.4 略大 0.1，保持 hub 视觉主导）。线条 stroke 提到 1.6 + 满 opacity（与 DE/RCP 一致）。无环装饰，靠尺寸阶层与线条满 opacity 表达 hub 权重。
B.svgInner:
<line x1="5.9977" y1="8.9985" x2="9.0023" y2="11.0015" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="1"/>
  <line x1="9.8538" y1="13.68" x2="8.6462" y2="16.82" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="1"/>
  <line x1="11.58" y1="10.56" x2="13.92" y2="7.44" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="1"/>
  <line x1="15.7215" y1="7.6491" x2="17.3777" y2="11.4348" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="1"/>
  <line x1="19.1791" y1="16.7164" x2="19.5634" y2="18.2537" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="1"/>
  <circle cx="4.5" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
  <circle cx="10.5" cy="12" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
  <circle cx="8" cy="18.5" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
  <circle cx="15" cy="6" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
  <circle cx="18.5" cy="14" r="2.5" fill="currentColor"/>
  <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>

C.name: C · Hub-as-Star 语义强化
C.desc: 普通节点均一化 r=1.3，hub 用双环结构（内 r=1.4 实心 + 外环 r=2.4 中心、stroke=1.0、外缘 2.9）表达『Rising Star』。线条 stroke=1.3、opacity=0.5 压暗，让 hub 视觉跳出。注：N5–N6 距离仅 6.2 单位，hub 外环已是几何上限——不能再扩。
C.svgInner:
<line x1="5.7481" y1="8.8321" x2="9.2519" y2="11.1679" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/>

  <line x1="19.2519" y1="17.0074" x2="19.6362" y2="18.5448" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/>
